query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: Pale blue light arranged in diagonal rows of elongated shapes against a solid black background, forming evenly spaced parallel bands that extend across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Pale blue light arranged in diagonal rows of elongated, motion-blurred shapes against a solid black background, forming evenly spaced parallel bands with smeared edges and no recognizable subject, creating an abstract composition devoid of fine detail.
